name: frequencyAnalysis
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.channels.every(c => c.dominantBand && typeof c.dominantBand.name === 'string' && Number.isFinite(c.dominantBand.relativePower))

output.ok === false || output.result.channels.every(c => ['delta','theta','alpha','beta','gamma'].every(b => c.bands[b] && typeof c.bands[b].label === 'string' && Number.isFinite(c.bands[b].relativePower)))
output.ok === false || output.result.channels.every(c => typeof c.indices.arousalLevel === 'string' && typeof c.indices.attentionIndex === 'string')
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data. Hanning-windowed radix-2 FFT → single-sided PSD → per-band power. The arousal/attention ratios (alphaBetaRatio, thetaBetaRatio) are CLAMPED to a finite sentinel (999) so a pure low-frequency signal with ~0 beta power never leaks Infinity into the rendered 'α/β …' value (fixed 2026-06-28). NeuroActionPanel's freq card maps over channels[].{channel,peakFrequency,dominantBand.{name,relativePower,association},bands.*.{label,relativePower},indices.{alphaBetaRatio,thetaBetaRatio,arousalLevel,attentionIndex}} EXACTLY.
